ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "wind_velocity" REAL /* Wind velocity in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station, buoy) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* A flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., good, questionable, bad) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* The method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the data is collected (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* The ID of the sensor used to collect the data */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* The model of the sensor used to collect the data */,
  "sensor_calibration_date" TEXT /* The date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "data_processing_level" TEXT /* The level of processing applied to the data (e.g., raw, quality-controlled, analyzed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* The type of station (e.g., ground, buoy, satellite) */,
  "station_elevation" REAL /* The elevation of the station in meters */,
  "station_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the station */,
  "station_established_date" TEXT /* The date the station was established */,
  "station_maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* The maintenance schedule for the station */,
  "station_contact_phone" TEXT /* The contact phone number for the station */,
  "station_website" TEXT /* The website for the station (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, meteorologist, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* The password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login_date" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* The department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* The position or role of the user within the organization */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography or profile of the user */,
  "user_profile_picture" TEXT /* The URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* The browser used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_author_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_approval_status" TEXT /* The approval status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the version */,
  "version_file_path" TEXT /* The file path to the versioned data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* The format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* The checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the file */,
  "file_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* The format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* The checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the file */,
  "file_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., instrument_model, calibration_date) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* The source of the metadata (e.g., manual entry, automated system) */,
  "metadata_entry_date" TEXT /* The date the metadata was entered */,
  "metadata_updated_date" TEXT /* The date the metadata was last updated */,
  "metadata_entry_user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who entered the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* The type of metadata (e.g., technical, descriptive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_metadata_entry_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("metadata_entry_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
